errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

navbarSearch.title: Start Your Search
navbarSearch.description: Click here to upload an image of any fashion item you want to find.

chooseSource.title: Choose Source
chooseSource.description: On mobile, you can either take a fresh photo or upload from your gallery.

segmentImage.title: Analyze Item
segmentImage.description: Click segment to let our AI isolate the clothing item. If it fails, just try again!

selectMask.title: Select Item
selectMask.description: After analyzing the image, click on the highlighted part of the image you want to search for.

sendSelected.title: Confirm Selection
sendSelected.description: Once you have selected the item, click here to proceed to styling context.

customizeSearch.title: Final Search
customizeSearch.description: Describe the style or click search to find matching items in our global archives.

rateResults.title: Rate Matches
rateResults.description: Rate each result to help the AI understand your style better.

swipeCards.title: Discover More
swipeCards.description: Swipe left or right to explore more matching pieces.

switchGrid.title: Grid Overview
switchGrid.description: Switch to grid view to see all discovered matches at once.
